brief_notes: Thorough with 4 summary tables (synth, entropy, timings, freq/duration). All numbers verified: subject counts/demographics 8/7/6/6, sampling 1200/2000Hz, signal parameters (5s pink noise, 10uV, 5-20uV, 9:1 trough:peak, Tukey 0.40, 2.5 cycles, 1-3s), -7/-6dB, 50-60%, SPRiNT <0.3, 64 channels max entropy 4.16, 3.82/4.05/4.15/4.15, 250/950ms, 200ms RT, 300ms offset, resting state frequencies/durations all match.
